plan.title: Add .githooks/ to deft-core-guard allowlist and refresh the deposited guard

narratives.Description: v0.40.0 deft-core-guard rejects every consumer upgrade PR because its installer-managed allowlist omits .githooks/, even though the installer now deposits repo-root .githooks/pre-commit and .githooks/pre-push as part of the framework install. This story adds .githooks/ to the allowlist so a framework-only upgrade PR passes, and refreshes the deposited guard workflow on upgrade.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
Add a .githooks/ prefix matcher to the installerManagedMatchers() function in the cmd/deft-install/deposit.go module so both the deposited guard regex and the Go classifier exempt the hook deposit.
Refresh the deposited deft-core-guard workflow on upgrade and add a deposit_test.go regression test asserting .githooks/pre-commit and .githooks/pre-push classify as installer-managed.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft consumer, I want a framework-only upgrade PR to pass deft-core-guard, so that I can land deft upgrades without the guard blocking every PR.

items.title: Given a consumer --upgrade PR that deposits .githooks/* alongside .deft/core/**, when deft-core-guard runs, then the guard passes instead of rejecting the PR.

narrative.Acceptance: Given a consumer --upgrade PR that deposits .githooks/* alongside .deft/core/**, when deft-core-guard runs, then the guard passes instead of rejecting the PR.

items.title: When an existing consumer runs the next --upgrade, then the installer refreshes the deposited deft-core-guard workflow rather than skipping it.

narrative.Acceptance: When an existing consumer runs the next --upgrade, then the installer refreshes the deposited deft-core-guard workflow rather than skipping it.

items.title: A regression test validates that .githooks/pre-commit and .githooks/pre-push classify as installer-managed and not as app files.

narrative.Acceptance: A regression test validates that .githooks/pre-commit and .githooks/pre-push classify as installer-managed and not as app files.

expected_outputs: deposited deft-core-guard workflow refreshed on upgrade

references.title: Issue #1478: deft-core-guard allowlist omits .githooks/ -- blocks every consumer v0.40.0 upgrade PR (#1463 deposit vs #1430 guard out of sync)
